grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites HB 5.14.1 for leasehold and HB 5.5.1-5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states to check lender's Part 2 for minimum unexpired term requirements and mentions this multiple times

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Only briefly mentions 'time-barred' enforcement without specifying the actual 4-year/10-year enforcement periods

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Does not mention indemnity insurance as a potential solution, only mentions reporting to lender or resolving compliance

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Provides detailed handbook-specific references and guidance rather than generic conveyancing advice
